case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. JOSE CARDOZA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 65798123) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-15-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-15-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $302.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 65798123) AS TO DEFENDANT CARDOZA, JOSE
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 65798123) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100047472), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED JUN-26-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARDOZA, JOSE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARDOZA, JOSE $8,634.95 PRINCIPAL, $302.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,937.90, SEE SCANNED DOC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CARDOZA, JOSE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-16-2019
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 65798123) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
